title: RCA of Circular Probe
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6p7ud","text":"This protocol is to verify that circular probe can conduct RCA reaction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 17.4 µL RNase-free water into a eppendorf
Add 3 µL of 10X phi29 polymerase reaction buffer
Add 1.5 µL of 0.5M EDTA buffer to suspend the reaction
Load 20 µL of reaction solution into 384-well plate
Measure the fluorescence excitation and emission intensity
creator: Chia-Hsien Shih
